items.claim: Nassourdine Imavov is one of the best strikers in the UFC.
items.quote: is one of the best strikers I think in all of the UFC.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier struggles against fast opponents.
items.quote: What gave Canoneir problems? The speed.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's physical decline due to age has exacerbated his issues with speed.
items.quote: Canoneir's two years older than in that fight to where the speed was a problem.

items.claim: Michael Page presents a uniquely difficult stylistic puzzle for opponents.
items.quote: one of the most difficult puzzles to deal with that we've ever seen in MMA

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan is physically larger than Jared Cannonier.
items.quote: at 6'2 with a 79 in reach, he's going to be a little bit bigger than Jared in there.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier typically holds a physicality advantage over his opponents.
items.quote: Jared's a guy that's normally has like a physicality advantage in a lot of ways.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier possesses dangerous leg kicks.
items.quote: We know Caner's got some nasty leg kicks as well
